transcript.text:
[Soondae (pork blood sausage)]
[But frying them?]
[Have you heard of this?]
[Fried Soondae]
[Let's try it]
[Crispy outside, soft inside]
[Agreed]
[Delicious]
[Can't leave the Tteokboki (spicy rice cake) out]
[This mukbang is jaw-dropping]
Hello everyone
I'm here to eat instant tteokboki near Banpo
I was near here last time when I did Apple House mukbang
[Uploaded on 2021.09.27] [They are now located near Isu Station]
This place is known for their fried soondae
I heard it's amazing

It's a pretty hard place to find
[Underground of this plaza]
[A hidden restaurant]
There it is
[Miso's House] [Seoul, Seocho-gu]
There's a lot of people here
Hello
It's not even lunch time right now
And it's really hidden
But it's packed
I also heard that this place usually has a waitlist
Menu
[Reading the menu]
We need to get the fried soondae
Their signature dish
Look at this

Fried soondae is "hella good"
I'm looking forward to it
Let's do 3 orders of that
Let's try the spicy mandu (fried dumplings) here too
Order of fishcake soup and mini kimbap
Excuse me
Which one is better? Instant tteokboki or soup tteokboki?
I recommend the instant tteokboki
They can fit up to 4 servings
Let's do that,
And also another order of fried soondae
Now for the add-ons
Which type of noodles?
Ramyun vs jjolmyun (thin noodles)
Both 1 of each
[Fried soondae]

[Instant tteokboki]
[Mini kimbap]
[Spicy mandu]
[Fishcake soup]
[A pot of 4 servings]
Thank you
They're all here Looks scrumptious
Let's cook this a little more
I love noodles
Let's try the fried soondae while we wait
It looks very crispy
That's so good
Crispy outside, soft inside
Thin outside layer with crisp
The texture and consistency is out of this world
With some sauce

I thought it was chojang (spicy sauce with vinegar), but it's not
It's tasty
The sauce is insane
Now I know why people come here for this
It's cooked perfectly
So soft and delicious
I need to eat the noodles
I'll eat the 2 noodles together
Amazing
It's a very soft flour rice cake
Tteokboki sauce tastes good
It's that...
Really well-seasoned broth
They're usually too sweet, but these are not
Yummy
Dip the soondae in here

This is incredible
It really is "hella good"
This is the spicy one
Let's see how different these are compared to the ones at Apple House
It's delicious Flavors are not too strong
Crispy and tasty
But their signature is definitely the fried soondae
[With some salt]
This really is...
They're popular for a reason
Some mini kimbap too
It's completely filled
That glossiness
With some sauce
Very savory
Really good kimbap

I ordered their popular items
Let's move the noodles
All this for myself
You know when you share a pot, the noodles are gone way too quickly
The noodles are getting better over time
The noodles are crazy good
These usually taste better over time
The longer they cook
Soft and chewy rice cake
Fried soondae
These don't necessarily get soggy over time either
Still crispy
Can you hear that?
Egg
They gave me 2
Some sauce over it

And break it up
You're a rookie if you don't do this with your boiled eggs
In 1 bite
This is it!
The noodles don't feel bloated either because of the thin noodles
Some salt
Why do I always get some on my clothes?
The soup is fabulous
This is a 2,000 Won fishcake soup (~$1.68 USD)
Stab,
Dip it in
How does it stay crispy?
Yum
Kimbap
Its got a lot of ingredients
The eggs are different It's a very good tasting kimbap

There's this thing...
Mayak Kimbap
Spicy mandu
The food here is not too sweet or strong overall
It feels like I'm here for a meal, not for a mukbang
There are dumplings in here too
People always want crispy fried dumplings,
But I also enjoy the ones drenched in sauce
Why's the kimbap so good? What's their secret?
You can feel the chewiness the second you bite into it
Crazy
Rice cake party
4 at a time
These are super soft
Soondae too
Excuse me

Do you plan to stay in this location?
-This is a location that I'm familiar with -Oh is that so? That's good
You look even more lean/fragile than I thought
Really?
It shocks me every time Where does it all go?
Disappears into my stomach
[Can't comprehend]
-Do you guys make the kimbap here? -Yes
It's so good What goes in here?
No MSG (artificial flavoring), right?
We use a little flavoring salt
Flavoring salt?
That's common
[But how is it this tasty?]
How?
It's really good You must get it

Kimbap and fried soondae
I feel like I always eat alone now after I started streaming
I ate alone before streaming too actually
Regular restaurants, even Korean BBQ
Everywhere Even buffets
Some KBBQ places don't allow 1 customer
I walked in 1 time,
And they said "You can only sit and order for 2 servings or more"
And I told them I would eat more than 2 servings
I used to go to Soondae restaurants like 5 times a week
Because rice and soup were free refills
This...
I keep forgetting that I'm filming I find myself eating without saying anything
Fishcake party
Ouch
I bit my cheek 2 times already

My mom told me this happens when I enjoy the food too much
[Mom, I'm bringing back battle scars]
1 of each left now What do I eat?
Egg,
Dumplings,
Let's eat this first
Egg
Break it up
I don't usually eat the boiled eggs inside cold noodles
But these are a must!
Kimbap next
Kimbap and soondae are the best here
[Finished]
I will be back for fried soondae
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
